steps.title: Use the zero product property
steps.content:
The constant factor $-5$ cannot make the product zero. One of the variable factors must equal zero.
$$v-8=0\quad \text{or}\quad v-3=0\quad \text{or}\quad v+6=0$$

steps.title: Find the listed solution
steps.content: The possible solutions are $v=8$, $v=3$, and $v=-6$. Of these, only $8$ appears in the choices. The answer is C.
